# Udarsy — منصة التعلم المغربية

> Udarsy is Morocco's educational platform for secondary school students
> preparing for the BAC (Baccalauréat) and Brevet examinations.
> Founded in 2021 in Rabat, Morocco. Serves 50,000+ active students.
> Languages: Arabic (Darija + MSA), French, English.

## What Udarsy offers
- Free curriculum-aligned lesson resources: PDFs, videos, exercises, and model exams
- BAC and Brevet exam preparation aligned with the Moroccan national curriculum (MENFPRS)
- Personalized progress tracking and AI-powered explanations
- Real-time community chat rooms organized by subject and grade level
- Teacher marketplace: verified teacher profiles, classroom rooms with invite codes
- Instructor platform: video courses and PDF resources from certified instructors
- Educational news: scholarships, exam dates, orientation guides for Moroccan students
- Contributions hub: students can submit and share study resources

## Subjects covered
Mathematics (Maths), Physics-Chemistry (Physique-Chimie),
Life & Earth Sciences (SVT — Sciences de la Vie et de la Terre),
Arabic Language (اللغة العربية), French Language (Français),
History-Geography (Histoire-Géographie), Islamic Education,
Philosophy (Philosophie — Terminal year only),
Engineering Sciences (Sciences de l'Ingénieur)

## Curriculum structure
School → Level (Tronc Commun / 1ère Bac / 2ème Bac) → Track (Guidance: Sciences, Lettres, etc.) → Subject → Lesson

## Pricing (MAD — Moroccan Dirham)
- Free: Basic access, community features, limited AI explanations (1/day)
- Pro: 199 MAD/month or 1,790 MAD/year — unlimited access, 30 AI explanations/day, no ads
- Premium: 299 MAD/month or 2,690 MAD/year — all Pro features + 1-on-1 instructor sessions, 70 AI explanations/day, priority support

## Platform statistics
- 50,000+ active students registered
- 1,200+ interactive lessons
- 50+ partner schools
- 120+ verified educators
- 4.9/5 average rating
- 42-minute average study session

## Key pages
/explore — Browse full curriculum by school, level, guidance, and subject
/pricing — Subscription plans and comparison in MAD
/about — Company story, team, and platform history
/teacher — Browse and rate verified teacher profiles
/instructors — Browse instructor profiles and courses
/news — Educational news, scholarships, exam schedules for Moroccan students
/contributions — Community resource submissions and leaderboard
/calendar — Moroccan school calendar with global events and personal todos
/contact — Contact form, phone, and email

## Do not index
/profile, /settings, /onboarding, /report, /teacher/dashboard,
/instructor-dashboard, /favorites/, /design-test, /design-lab, /teacher/join/
